coding_agent_history.name: Agent History
coding_agent_history.description: Reads your own turns from local agent transcripts (Claude Code, Codex) into Magi's memory.

claude_code.description: Your own turns from local Claude Code transcripts.

codex.description: Your own turns from local Codex prompts.

source_paths.label: Transcript Folders
source_paths.description: Folders to scan for this agent's local transcripts.

initial_sync_lookback_days.label: First-sync window (days)
initial_sync_lookback_days.description: First sync ingests sessions from the last N days (raise to import more).

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to rescan for new sessions.

activation.title: Connect agent history
activation.description: Magi reads only your own messages from local agent transcripts. Obvious secrets are scrubbed before anything leaves your device.
